zh-CN.title: 情绪命名练习
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 把模糊的不舒服拆成一个具体情绪词，而不是马上解释或压下去。
zh-CN.do_today: 今天只做一个动作：在一个低风险场景里使用“我先不急着判断对错。我现在更像是感到……”这句话。
zh-CN.script: 我先不急着判断对错。我现在更像是感到……

seven_day_plan.practice: 写下今天最明显的一个情绪词。
把一个情绪拆成事实、感受、请求。
记录身体里最先出现的信号。
把“我很烦”改成更具体的词。
在一次对话后补写真实感受。
找出一个最常见触发点。
选一个下周继续使用的情绪词。

zh-CN.common_failure: 最常见失败不是不会做，而是等到情绪已经很满才想起来做。
zh-CN.repair_move: 如果没做到，不要重开整套计划；只复盘一个触发点和下一次第一句话。
zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把练习变成要求自己完美稳定。先追求多一次停顿、多一句清楚表达。

en.title: Name the Emotion
en.why_this_matters: Turn a vague discomfort into a specific emotion word before explaining it away or pushing it down.
en.do_today: Today, use one low-risk version of this sentence: “I do not need to decide whether this is right or wrong yet. What I notice first is...”
en.script: I do not need to decide whether this is right or wrong yet. What I notice first is...

seven_day_plan.practice: Write down the clearest emotion word you felt today.
Separate one moment into fact, feeling, and request.
Notice the first body signal that showed up.
Replace “I’m annoyed” with a more precise word.
After one conversation, write the feeling you did not say.
Find one recurring trigger.
Choose one emotion word to keep using next week.

en.common_failure: The common failure is not lack of knowledge. It is remembering the tool only after the emotion is already high.
en.repair_move: If you miss it, do not restart the whole plan. Review one trigger and one first sentence for next time.
en.watch_out: Do not turn the practice into a demand to be perfectly steady. Aim for one extra pause or one clearer sentence.

meta.risk_notes: Practice guidance only; no outcome promise.

zh-CN.title: 暂停与恢复
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 在被触发后先创造几秒钟空间，让回应不完全由第一反应决定。
zh-CN.do_today: 今天只做一个动作：在一个低风险场景里使用“我想停一下再回答，这样我能说得更清楚。”这句话。
zh-CN.script: 我想停一下再回答，这样我能说得更清楚。

seven_day_plan.practice: 选一个触发词，练习十秒暂停。
延迟回复一条不紧急消息。
用一次深呼气结束第一反应。
说出“我需要想一下”。
记录暂停前后语气差异。
复盘一次没停住的场景。
选出最有效的恢复动作。

zh-CN.common_failure: 最常见失败不是不会做，而是等到情绪已经很满才想起来做。
zh-CN.repair_move: 如果没做到，不要重开整套计划；只复盘一个触发点和下一次第一句话。
zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把练习变成要求自己完美稳定。先追求多一次停顿、多一句清楚表达。

en.title: Pause and Recover
en.why_this_matters: Create a few seconds of space after being triggered, so your response is not decided by the first impulse.
en.do_today: Today, use one low-risk version of this sentence: “I want to pause before I answer, so I can respond more clearly.”
en.script: I want to pause before I answer, so I can respond more clearly.

seven_day_plan.practice: Choose one trigger word and practice a ten-second pause.
Delay one non-urgent reply.
Use one long exhale to end the first impulse.
Say, “I need a moment to think.”
Compare your tone before and after pausing.
Review one moment when you did not pause.
Choose the reset step that worked best.

en.common_failure: The common failure is not lack of knowledge. It is remembering the tool only after the emotion is already high.
en.repair_move: If you miss it, do not restart the whole plan. Review one trigger and one first sentence for next time.
en.watch_out: Do not turn the practice into a demand to be perfectly steady. Aim for one extra pause or one clearer sentence.

meta.risk_notes: Practice guidance only; no outcome promise.

zh-CN.title: 反馈减压
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 把反馈里的事实、情绪和下一步拆开，避免把别人的语气全部当成自我否定。
zh-CN.do_today: 今天只做一个动作：在一个低风险场景里使用“我先确认一下：你最希望我调整的是结果、过程，还是沟通方式？”这句话。
zh-CN.script: 我先确认一下：你最希望我调整的是结果、过程，还是沟通方式？

seven_day_plan.practice: 回顾一次反馈，写下事实部分。
单独写下反馈里的情绪语气。
列出对方真正要求你改的一个点。
用脚本问一次澄清问题。
把自我否定改成行动清单。
记录反馈后恢复所需时间。
总结你下次先听哪一层。

zh-CN.common_failure: 最常见失败不是不会做，而是等到情绪已经很满才想起来做。
zh-CN.repair_move: 如果没做到，不要重开整套计划；只复盘一个触发点和下一次第一句话。
zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把练习变成要求自己完美稳定。先追求多一次停顿、多一句清楚表达。

en.title: Decompress Feedback
en.why_this_matters: Separate facts, tone, and next steps so the other person’s emotion does not become your self-judgment.
en.do_today: Today, use one low-risk version of this sentence: “Let me check: are you asking me to adjust the outcome, the process, or the way I communicated?”
en.script: Let me check: are you asking me to adjust the outcome, the process, or the way I communicated?

seven_day_plan.practice: Review one piece of feedback and write the factual part.
Write the emotional tone separately.
Name the one change the person actually asked for.
Use the script to ask one clarifying question.
Turn self-criticism into one action item.
Track how long it took to recover from the feedback.
Summarize which layer you will listen for first next time.

en.common_failure: The common failure is not lack of knowledge. It is remembering the tool only after the emotion is already high.
en.repair_move: If you miss it, do not restart the whole plan. Review one trigger and one first sentence for next time.
en.watch_out: Do not turn the practice into a demand to be perfectly steady. Aim for one extra pause or one clearer sentence.

meta.risk_notes: Practice guidance only; no outcome promise.

zh-CN.title: 共情后的边界
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 理解别人之后，明确你能支持什么、不能替对方承担什么。
zh-CN.do_today: 今天只做一个动作：在一个低风险场景里使用“我理解这件事对你很重。我可以陪你理清下一步，但不能替你承接全部压力。”这句话。
zh-CN.script: 我理解这件事对你很重。我可以陪你理清下一步，但不能替你承接全部压力。

seven_day_plan.practice: 列出一次你替别人承担的事。
区分陪伴、建议和负责。
练习一句边界脚本。
只承诺一个具体支持动作。
观察说边界后的身体反应。
复盘边界是否真的伤害关系。
选出下周不再自动接管的场景。

zh-CN.common_failure: 最常见失败不是不会做，而是等到情绪已经很满才想起来做。
zh-CN.repair_move: 如果没做到，不要重开整套计划；只复盘一个触发点和下一次第一句话。
zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把练习变成要求自己完美稳定。先追求多一次停顿、多一句清楚表达。

en.title: Empathy with a Boundary
en.why_this_matters: After understanding someone, clarify what you can support and what you cannot carry for them.
en.do_today: Today, use one low-risk version of this sentence: “I can see this is heavy for you. I can help you sort the next step, but I cannot carry the whole weight for you.”
en.script: I can see this is heavy for you. I can help you sort the next step, but I cannot carry the whole weight for you.

seven_day_plan.practice: List one recent moment when you carried someone else’s load.
Separate companionship, advice, and responsibility.
Practice one boundary sentence.
Commit to only one specific support action.
Notice your body after stating a boundary.
Review whether the boundary actually harmed the relationship.
Choose one situation next week where you will not automatically take over.

en.common_failure: The common failure is not lack of knowledge. It is remembering the tool only after the emotion is already high.
en.repair_move: If you miss it, do not restart the whole plan. Review one trigger and one first sentence for next time.
en.watch_out: Do not turn the practice into a demand to be perfectly steady. Aim for one extra pause or one clearer sentence.

meta.risk_notes: Practice guidance only; no outcome promise.

zh-CN.title: 冲突后的修复
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 把“我不是故意的”升级成“我看见了影响，并愿意修复”。
zh-CN.do_today: 今天只做一个动作：在一个低风险场景里使用“刚才我的表达可能让你觉得被否定了。我想重新说一次，并先听听你听到了什么。”这句话。
zh-CN.script: 刚才我的表达可能让你觉得被否定了。我想重新说一次，并先听听你听到了什么。

seven_day_plan.practice: 写下一次关系紧张中的实际影响。
把“我不是故意”改成“我看见影响”。
向一个小误会练习修复句。
确认对方听到的版本。
补一个具体修正动作。
复盘修复后关系是否更清楚。
写下你最常跳过的修复步骤。

zh-CN.common_failure: 最常见失败不是不会做，而是等到情绪已经很满才想起来做。
zh-CN.repair_move: 如果没做到，不要重开整套计划；只复盘一个触发点和下一次第一句话。

en.title: Repair After Impact
en.why_this_matters: Move from “I did not mean it” to “I see the impact and I want to repair it.”
en.do_today: Today, use one low-risk version of this sentence: “What I said may have landed as dismissive. I want to try again, and first I want to hear how it landed for you.”
en.script: What I said may have landed as dismissive. I want to try again, and first I want to hear how it landed for you.

seven_day_plan.practice: Write the real impact of one tense moment.
Replace “I didn’t mean it” with “I see the impact.”
Practice one repair line after a small misunderstanding.
Ask what the other person heard.
Add one concrete corrective action.
Review whether repair made the relationship clearer.
Name the repair step you usually skip.

en.common_failure: The common failure is not lack of knowledge. It is remembering the tool only after the emotion is already high.
en.repair_move: If you miss it, do not restart the whole plan. Review one trigger and one first sentence for next time.
en.watch_out: Do not turn the practice into a demand to be perfectly steady. Aim for one extra pause or one clearer sentence.

zh-CN.title: 不升级的表达
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 把真实表达从攻击、证明或压制里分离出来。
zh-CN.do_today: 今天只做一个动作：在一个低风险场景里使用“我想说清楚我的感受，但不是为了压过你。我的重点是……”这句话。
zh-CN.script: 我想说清楚我的感受，但不是为了压过你。我的重点是……

seven_day_plan.practice: 围绕“不升级的表达”做一次真实场景观察。
写下这个练习最容易出现的触发点。
试用脚本中的第一句话。
把一次对话拆成事实、情绪和下一步。
做一个小边界或小修复动作。
复盘做得不完美但有进步的地方。
选出下周继续练的一句话。

zh-CN.common_failure: 最常见失败不是不会做，而是等到情绪已经很满才想起来做。

en.do_today: Today, use one low-risk version of this sentence: “I want to be clear about my experience, not to overpower yours. The point I want to make is...”
en.script: I want to be clear about my experience, not to overpower yours. The point I want to make is...

seven_day_plan.practice: Observe one real situation connected to Express Without Escalating.
Write down the trigger that shows up most often.
Try the first sentence of the script once.
Split one conversation into facts, feelings, and next action.
Make one small boundary or repair move.
Review one imperfect but improved attempt.
Choose one sentence to keep practicing next week.

seven_day_plan.practice: 围绕“回到自己”做一次真实场景观察。

zh-CN.common_failure: 最常见失败不是不会做，而是等到情绪已经很满才想起来做。
zh-CN.repair_move: 如果没做到，不要重开整套计划；只复盘一个触发点和下一次第一句话。
zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把练习变成要求自己完美稳定。先追求多一次停顿、多一句清楚表达。

en.title: State the Need Clearly
en.why_this_matters: Turn internal steadiness into a request another person can actually understand.
en.do_today: Today, use one low-risk version of this sentence: “What I need right now is... Would you be willing to...?”
en.script: What I need right now is... Would you be willing to...?

seven_day_plan.practice: Observe one real situation connected to State the Need Clearly.
Write down the trigger that shows up most often.
Try the first sentence of the script once.
Split one conversation into facts, feelings, and next action.
Make one small boundary or repair move.
Review one imperfect but improved attempt.
Choose one sentence to keep practicing next week.

en.common_failure: The common failure is not lack of knowledge. It is remembering the tool only after the emotion is already high.
en.repair_move: If you miss it, do not restart the whole plan. Review one trigger and one first sentence for next time.
en.watch_out: Do not turn the practice into a demand to be perfectly steady. Aim for one extra pause or one clearer sentence.

meta.risk_notes: Practice guidance only; no outcome promise.
